title: GolemBlood
description: From the ARG: Those Aren't Golems. [Forge]
body:
# The only horror mod that ISN'T A Dweller Re-skin.

## Summary

Introducing the only horror mod that stands apart from the countless Dweller re-skins flooding Modrinth Currently. This **isn’t** just another recycled concept—it’s a genuinely terrifying experience designed to unsettle and thrill in equal measure. Crafted with care, this mod delivers a fresh and engaging twist on horror gameplay, offering something truly different for players seeking a break from the ordinary. It’s not just scary—it’s a fun, unique adventure that keeps you on edge.

![Golemblood In-Game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/294c2cfdf11e5abe299fb4d21a0340e70a9693de_0.webp)

This mod’s fright factor is no exaggeration. In fact, it was so intense that it made its own creator, KrafterMC, scream during development—a testament to its chilling authenticity. And it’s not just the creator who felt the fear. My friend **Damien**, after experiencing it firsthand, couldn’t hold back his reaction, blurting out a real, unfiltered quote: _“Bro, I didn’t think it was gonna be THAT scary.”_ That’s the kind of response this mod evokes—raw, unexpected, and unforgettable.

## The ARG

[https://www.youtube.com/@Tags-A](https://www.youtube.com/@Tags-A)

Created by KrafterMC, this isn’t just a mod—it’s a bold step into horror that proves you don’t need to lean on tired tropes to deliver a spine-chilling good time.

![Refugee In-Game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf411cd7c80c3e694c01dc5040fe1f4074b06a20_0.webp)

## About the Entitys

The entitys Known as Golemblood And Refugee are quite intresting characters
Golemblood is as fast as the Player, But Isn't as smart as the Refugee. Unlike Golemblood, You get Stalked by the Refugee.

## Thank you for Playing and have a Splendid Day!

### Creator

[KrafterMC](https://www.youtube.com/@KrafterMC)
